name: Entity Properties
desc: Updates an entity's generic attributes (movement speed, max health, knockback resistance, etc.).
notes: Attribute keys: generic.movementSpeed, generic.maxHealth, generic.knockbackResistance, generic.followRange, horse.jumpStrength, zombie.spawnReinforcements, etc. Movement speed can be read to predict horse speeds or detect speed-modified players.

implementation.overview: S20PacketEntityProperties updates entity attributes — movement speed, max health, knockback resistance. KillAura modules read max health for health ratio calculations. Speed modules read movement speed to predict opponent velocity. No module in the examined client sources directly references this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S20PacketEntityProperties)
modules.purpose: Server sends S20PacketEntityProperties to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
